FR-01.title: User Login
requirements: Two input fields for email and password
The email must be validated for the correct format
The password field should have a show/hide toggle
acceptance_criteria: User can successfully log in with a valid email and password
The system shows an error message for invalid credentials
User is redirected to the dashboard after successful login

FR-02.title: User Registration
requirements: Registration form with name, email, and password fields
Password must be at least 8 characters with one uppercase and one number
System shall send verification email after registration
Duplicate email addresses shall not be allowed
acceptance_criteria: User can register with valid details and receive confirmation
System rejects registration with existing email
Verification email is received within 60 seconds
User cannot login until email is verified

FR-03.title: Product Catalog
requirements: Display all products with name, image, price, and category
Users can filter products by category and price range
Users can sort products by price, name, and newest
Pagination with 20 products per page
acceptance_criteria: All active products are displayed with correct details
Filters correctly narrow down product list
Sort order changes immediately on selection
Pagination navigation works correctly

FR-04.title: Product Detail Page
requirements: Display product name, images, price, description, and reviews
Image gallery with zoom and thumbnail navigation
Add to cart button with quantity selector
Display average rating and individual reviews
acceptance_criteria: All product details load correctly
Image gallery allows zoom and navigation
Add to cart updates cart count in header
Reviews display with star rating, text, and author

FR-05.title: Shopping Cart
requirements: Users can add products to cart with quantity selection
Users can update item quantities in cart
Users can remove items from cart
Cart displays subtotal, tax, and grand total
Cart persists across sessions for logged-in users
acceptance_criteria: Product is added to cart with correct quantity
Quantity update reflects in cart total immediately
Item removal updates cart total correctly
Cart contents persist after logout and login

FR-06.title: Checkout Process
requirements: Multi-step checkout with shipping, payment, and review
Shipping address form with validation
Payment integration with credit card processing
Order review showing all items and totals before confirmation
acceptance_criteria: User can complete checkout in 3 steps
Invalid shipping address is rejected with errors
Payment processes correctly and shows confirmation
Order review shows accurate totals and items

FR-07.title: Order Management
requirements: Users can view order history with status
Order detail page shows items, shipping, and tracking
Users can cancel orders before shipping
System generates unique order ID for each order
acceptance_criteria: Order history lists all past orders with status
Order detail shows complete information
Cancellation is only possible before shipping status
Order confirmation email is sent with order ID

FR-08.title: Product Search
requirements: Search bar in header with auto-suggest
Full-text search across product names and descriptions
Search results page with filters and sorting
Recent search history for logged-in users
acceptance_criteria: Auto-suggest shows relevant results while typing
Search returns accurate results within 500ms
Filters work correctly on search results
Recent searches are saved and displayed

FR-09.title: Product Reviews and Ratings
requirements: Users can submit star rating (1-5) and text review
Only verified purchasers can leave reviews
Average rating displayed on product card and detail page
Reviews can be sorted by newest, highest, and lowest rating
acceptance_criteria: Review is submitted and displayed on product page
Non-purchasers cannot submit reviews
Average rating updates after new review
Sort options change review order correctly

FR-10.title: Wishlist
requirements: Users can add products to wishlist
Wishlist page shows all saved products
Users can move items from wishlist to cart
Wishlist persists across sessions
acceptance_criteria: Product is added to wishlist with heart icon toggle
Wishlist page displays all saved items
Move to cart adds item and removes from wishlist
Wishlist is synced across devices for logged-in users

FR-11.title: User Profile Management
requirements: Users can view and edit profile information
Users can change password with current password verification
Users can manage saved shipping addresses
Users can view and manage payment methods
acceptance_criteria: Profile updates are saved and reflected immediately
Password change requires correct current password
Multiple shipping addresses can be saved and set as default
Payment methods can be added and removed securely

FR-12.title: Admin Product Management
requirements: Admin can add new products with all details
Admin can edit existing product information
Admin can delete or deactivate products
Admin can manage product categories
acceptance_criteria: New product is created and visible in catalog
Product edits are saved and reflected in frontend
Deleted products are removed from catalog
Categories can be created, edited, and deleted

FR-13.title: Coupon and Discount System
requirements: Admin can create coupon codes with percentage or fixed discount
Coupons can have expiry date and usage limits
Users can apply coupon code at checkout
System validates coupon eligibility before applying
acceptance_criteria: Valid coupon deducts correct amount from total
Expired coupon shows error message
Coupon with reached usage limit is rejected
Discount is reflected in order summary

FR-14.title: Email Notifications
requirements: System sends order confirmation email after purchase
System sends shipping notification with tracking link
System sends password reset email when requested
System sends promotional emails to opted-in users
acceptance_criteria: Order confirmation email contains order details and ID
Shipping email includes tracking number and carrier link
Password reset link expires after 1 hour
Users can unsubscribe from promotional emails

FR-15.title: Inventory Management
requirements: System tracks stock quantity for each product
Out-of-stock products show unavailable badge
Admin receives low stock alerts
Stock updates automatically on order placement
acceptance_criteria: Stock count decreases after successful order
Out-of-stock products cannot be added to cart
Low stock alert sent when quantity below threshold
Admin can manually adjust stock quantities

FR-01.title: Build Login API Endpoint
FR-01.description: Create POST /api/auth/login. Accept email and password in request body. Validate email format server-side. Verify credentials against database. Hash comparison using bcrypt. Return JWT token on success with user data. Return 401 with error message on failure.

FR-01.title: Build Login Page UI
FR-01.description: Create login page with email input field with format validation, password input field with show/hide toggle button. Add client-side validation for email format. Show inline error messages for invalid inputs. Redirect to dashboard on successful login. Display error toast on failed login.

FR-01.title: Write Login Tests
FR-01.description: Test successful login with valid credentials redirects to dashboard. Test invalid credentials show error message. Test email format validation rejects invalid emails. Test password show/hide toggle works correctly.

FR-02.title: Build Registration API Endpoint
FR-02.description: Create POST /api/auth/register. Accept name, email, password. Validate email uniqueness against database. Enforce password complexity (min 8 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 number). Hash password with bcrypt. Create user record with is_verified=false. Return 201 on success, 409 on duplicate email.

FR-02.title: Build Registration Page UI
FR-02.description: Create registration form with name, email, and password fields. Add real-time password strength indicator. Show password requirements checklist. Client-side validation for all fields. Show success message and prompt to check email.

FR-02.title: Implement Email Verification Service
FR-02.description: Generate unique verification token on registration. Store token with 24-hour expiry. Send verification email with clickable link. Create GET /api/auth/verify/:token endpoint. Mark user as verified on valid token.

FR-02.title: Write Registration Tests
FR-02.description: Test successful registration creates user and sends email. Test duplicate email returns 409. Test weak password is rejected. Test verification link activates account.

FR-03.title: Build Product Listing API
FR-03.description: Create GET /api/products with query params: category, min_price, max_price, sort_by, page, limit (default 20). Return paginated array with total count. Only return active products.

FR-03.title: Create Product Card Component
FR-03.description: Build reusable ProductCard component with product image (lazy loading), name, formatted price, and category badge. Add hover effect. Click navigates to detail page.

FR-03.title: Build Filter and Sort UI
FR-03.description: Create sidebar filter panel with category checkboxes, price range slider. Add sort dropdown with price, name, newest options. Update URL params on change and refetch.

FR-03.title: Create Products Database Schema
FR-03.description: Design products collection: name, description, price, image_url, category_id, stock_quantity, is_active, created_at, updated_at. Create categories collection. Add indexes on category_id, price, created_at.

FR-04.title: Build Product Detail API
FR-04.description: Create GET /api/products/:slug endpoint. Return product with all fields including images array, reviews, and average rating. Increment view count. Return 404 if not found.

FR-04.title: Build Product Detail Page
FR-04.description: Create product detail page with image gallery (main image + thumbnails with zoom), product info section (name, price, rating stars, description), quantity selector, and Add to Cart button. Show reviews section below.

FR-04.title: Build Image Gallery Component
FR-04.description: Create reusable image gallery with main image display, thumbnail strip navigation, zoom on hover or click, and swipe support for mobile. Handle image loading states.

FR-05.title: Build Cart API Endpoints
FR-05.description: Create cart REST API: POST /api/cart/items (add item), PATCH /api/cart/items/:id (update quantity), DELETE /api/cart/items/:id (remove), GET /api/cart (get full cart with totals). Link to authenticated user.

FR-05.title: Build Shopping Cart Page
FR-05.description: Create cart page with item list showing product image, name, quantity selector, unit price, and line total. Remove button per item. Display subtotal, tax, and grand total. Continue Shopping and Checkout buttons.

FR-05.title: Implement Cart Persistence
FR-05.description: Store cart in database for logged-in users. On login merge local cart with server cart. Sync on page load. Handle concurrent updates.

FR-05.title: Write Cart Tests
FR-05.description: Test add item increases count. Test quantity update changes total. Test remove item updates correctly. Test cart persists after logout/login.

FR-06.title: Build Checkout API
FR-06.description: Create POST /api/checkout endpoint. Accept shipping address, payment method, and cart reference. Validate stock availability. Process payment. Create order record. Deduct stock. Clear cart. Return order confirmation.

FR-06.title: Build Multi-Step Checkout UI
FR-06.description: Create checkout flow: Step 1 - Shipping address form with saved address dropdown. Step 2 - Payment method selection with card form. Step 3 - Order review with all items, shipping, and totals. Place Order button.

FR-06.title: Integrate Payment Processing
FR-06.description: Implement payment gateway integration. Create payment intent on checkout start. Handle card validation. Process payment on order confirmation. Handle payment failures gracefully with user feedback.

FR-06.title: Write Checkout Tests
FR-06.description: Test successful checkout creates order. Test insufficient stock prevents order. Test invalid card shows error. Test order total matches cart total.

FR-07.title: Build Order History API
FR-07.description: Create GET /api/orders endpoint with pagination. Return user orders with status, total, date, and item count. Create GET /api/orders/:id for detail. Add PATCH /api/orders/:id/cancel for cancellation.

FR-07.title: Build Order History Page
FR-07.description: Create order history page with list of orders showing order ID, date, status badge, item count, and total. Click opens order detail. Add cancel button for pending orders.

FR-07.title: Build Order Detail Page
FR-07.description: Create order detail view showing items with images and prices, shipping address, payment method, status timeline, tracking information, and order total breakdown.

FR-07.title: Create Orders Database Schema
FR-07.description: Design orders collection: order_id (unique), user_id, items array, shipping_address, payment_method, subtotal, tax, total, status (pending/confirmed/shipped/delivered/cancelled), tracking_number, created_at, updated_at.

FR-08.title: Build Product Search API
FR-08.description: Create GET /api/products/search with query parameter. Implement full-text search across name and description using MongoDB text index. Return results with relevance scoring. Support filters and pagination.

FR-08.title: Build Search UI with Auto-suggest
FR-08.description: Create search bar in header with debounced auto-suggest dropdown (300ms). Show product name, image thumbnail, and price in suggestions. Enter key or click navigates to search results page.

FR-08.title: Implement Search History
FR-08.description: Store recent searches for logged-in users (last 10). Create GET /api/search/history and DELETE /api/search/history endpoints. Show recent searches in dropdown when search bar is focused.

FR-09.title: Build Reviews API
FR-09.description: Create POST /api/products/:id/reviews (submit review with rating 1-5 and text). Verify user has purchased product. Create GET /api/products/:id/reviews with sort and pagination. Calculate average rating.

FR-09.title: Build Review Submission Form
FR-09.description: Create review form with star rating selector (clickable stars), text area for review, and submit button. Show only for verified purchasers. Display success message after submission.

FR-09.title: Build Reviews Display Section
FR-09.description: Create reviews section on product page with average rating summary bar, individual review cards with stars, text, author, and date. Add sort dropdown for newest, highest, lowest.

FR-10.title: Build Wishlist API
FR-10.description: Create POST /api/wishlist/:productId (add), DELETE /api/wishlist/:productId (remove), GET /api/wishlist (list all). POST /api/wishlist/:productId/move-to-cart to move item to cart.

FR-10.title: Build Wishlist Page
FR-10.description: Create wishlist page with product cards showing image, name, price, and action buttons (Move to Cart, Remove). Show empty state with link to browse products.

FR-10.title: Add Wishlist Toggle to Product Cards
FR-10.description: Add heart icon button on ProductCard and product detail page. Toggle between filled (in wishlist) and outline (not in wishlist). Optimistic UI update with API sync.

FR-11.title: Build Profile API
FR-11.description: Create GET /api/profile (get current user profile), PATCH /api/profile (update name, email, phone), PATCH /api/profile/password (change password with current password verification).

FR-11.title: Build Profile Settings Page
FR-11.description: Create profile settings page with editable fields for name, email, phone. Password change section with current password, new password, and confirm fields. Save button with validation.

FR-11.title: Build Address Management
FR-11.description: Create CRUD API for shipping addresses: GET /api/addresses, POST /api/addresses, PATCH /api/addresses/:id, DELETE /api/addresses/:id. Support setting default address.

FR-12.title: Build Admin Product CRUD API
FR-12.description: Create admin endpoints: POST /api/admin/products (create), PATCH /api/admin/products/:id (update), DELETE /api/admin/products/:id (soft delete). Validate admin role. Support image upload.

FR-12.title: Build Admin Product Dashboard
FR-12.description: Create admin product management page with data table showing name, price, stock, status. Add/Edit forms with all product fields. Delete with confirmation dialog. Bulk actions support.

FR-12.title: Build Category Management
FR-12.description: Create CRUD API for categories: GET, POST, PATCH, DELETE /api/admin/categories. Admin UI with category list, add/edit form, and delete confirmation. Handle products in deleted categories.

FR-13.title: Build Coupon API
FR-13.description: Create admin endpoints: POST /api/admin/coupons (create), GET /api/admin/coupons (list). Create POST /api/coupons/validate for user coupon application. Check expiry, usage limit, and minimum order amount.

FR-13.title: Build Coupon Input at Checkout
FR-13.description: Add coupon code input field at checkout. Apply button that validates coupon. Show discount amount and updated total. Error message for invalid or expired coupons.

FR-13.title: Create Coupons Database Schema
FR-13.description: Design coupons collection: code (unique), type (percentage/fixed), value, min_order_amount, max_uses, current_uses, expiry_date, is_active, created_at. Add index on code.

FR-14.title: Build Email Notification Service
FR-14.description: Create email service with template system. Implement templates for: order confirmation, shipping update, password reset, and promotional emails. Use queue system for reliable delivery.

FR-14.title: Implement Password Reset Flow
FR-14.description: Create POST /api/auth/forgot-password (send reset email), POST /api/auth/reset-password (reset with token). Generate token with 1-hour expiry. Build frontend forgot password and reset pages.

FR-14.title: Build Email Preference Management
FR-14.description: Create email preferences page in user profile. Toggle promotional emails on/off. Add unsubscribe link to promotional emails. Store preferences in user record.

FR-15.title: Build Inventory Tracking System
FR-15.description: Create inventory service that tracks stock per product. Auto-deduct on order placement using database transactions. Auto-increment on order cancellation. Create stock movement log.

FR-15.title: Build Low Stock Alert System
FR-15.description: Create configurable threshold per product (default 10). Scheduled check for low stock. Send email alert to admin with low stock item list. Add alert badge in admin dashboard.

FR-15.title: Build Admin Inventory Dashboard
FR-15.description: Create admin inventory page with product stock table showing name, current quantity, threshold, and status indicator. Allow inline stock adjustment. Show stock movement history.
